name: project-health-pass
description: Self-improving repo health remediation with audit/fix/diff modes, evidence coverage, counter-review, and HP-* findings.

interface.longDescription: Read .agent_memory.json, select audit-only/fix-verified/baseline-diff mode, map a repository, run native checks, maintain evidence coverage, counter-review serious findings, assign stable HP-* IDs, rank P0/P1/P2/P3 issues, build a safest-first remediation backlog, fix verified core reliability problems, add focused tests, optionally emit JSON reports, update memory, and report remaining risks.
defaultPrompt: Use Project Health Pass to perform a self-improving deep project-wide health pass.
Use Project Health Pass in audit-only mode and produce stable HP-* findings.
Use Project Health Pass to produce evidence coverage and a safest-first remediation backlog.
Use Project Health Pass to fix verified P0/P1/P2 reliability problems.
